distributional_test.but: The matching is DEGENERATE — all MF objects map to same RMT neighbors

precision_test.verdict: FAILS — matched RMT stats are CONSTANT across all Megethos bins
precision_test.values: sp_var=0.7314, sp_kurt=0.6362, nn_ratio=-0.6111 (identical in all 10 bins)
precision_test.cause: RMT has pure Phasma (no Megethos). All MF objects match to the same few RMT objects regardless of level.
precision_test.fix: RMT domain needs log(conductor) of the underlying EC as a Megethos feature to enable differentiated matching.

honest_assessment: The distributional coupling is real (massive KS stats) but degenerate (all match to same objects). The Montgomery-Odlyzko connection exists but our current measurement cannot distinguish it from trivial phoneme-space collapse. Need RMT with Megethos to test properly.
